message:
feat(loader): add smart JSONL file discovery with fallback support

Improve the beads file loading to handle multiple naming conventions:

Add FindJSONLPath() function:
- Scans .beads directory for valid JSONL files
- Prefers "beads.jsonl" (canonical name) over "issues.jsonl" (legacy)
- Automatically skips non-data files:
  - Backup files (.backup suffix)
  - Merge artifacts (.orig, .merge suffixes)
  - Deletion manifests (deletions.jsonl)
- Falls back to first available candidate if neither canonical nor
  legacy name is found
- Returns descriptive errors when no valid file exists

Update LoadIssues():
- Use FindJSONLPath() instead of hardcoded "issues.jsonl" path
- Maintain backward compatibility with existing repositories
- Improve error handling with wrapped errors for better debugging

This change enables beads_viewer to work with repositories that use
different JSONL file naming conventions, making it more robust for
various beads configurations and migration scenarios.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
